creator: arrowd@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 186110
updated shar

I've updated the shar and addressed comments. The only thing is that 0.5 version requires newer devel/efl than we have, so this is blocked by https://reviews.freebsd.org/D12154

I don't have resources to run poudriere QA, because this port pulls in llvm40, which my machine simply ain't able to link.

I've also talked to Larca and she let me be maintainer of this port.
